label: Stage fail trigger (pawn alive)
description: Fails the stage if the specified role pawn is still alive when the check runs.

allowanceTicks.label: Allowance ticks
allowanceTicks.description: Number of ticks the condition is allowed to persist before the stage fails.

pawnId.label: Pawn ID
pawnId.description: ID of the role pawn that must be dead for the stage to continue (fails if still alive).
